parser_version_note: parse_guide.py — no changes made for this gate

standard_path.format: 2-column multiline (Course Description + CUs; no Term column)

quality.prereq_note: 1 false positive — 'for this course and there is no specific technical knowledge needed' matched from 'is a prerequisite for this course' pattern in Composition: Successful Self-Expression description; pre-existing behavior

structural_elements_evaluated.student_teaching_sections: Parsed correctly as 'Student Teaching' AoS group label with 2 courses underneath — same pattern as BSMES. No new handler needed.
structural_elements_evaluated.clinical_experiences_sections: Parsed correctly as 'Clinical Experiences' AoS group label with 2 courses underneath. No new handler needed.
structural_elements_evaluated.licensure_related_sections: 'State Licensure Requirements' appears in boilerplate preamble before Standard Path. Not a parsed section. No structural impact.
structural_elements_evaluated.gateway_field_experience_practicum: No standalone Field Experience or Practicum sections detected. Not applicable to BAELED.
structural_elements_evaluated.standard_path_format: 2-column multiline (no Term). Already supported via detect_sp_has_term() + has_term=False path. No change needed.
structural_elements_evaluated.areas_of_study_structure: Standard group > course > description > competencies pattern. 5 groups. Parsed cleanly.
structural_elements_evaluated.capstone_terminal_section: No Capstone section. Handled gracefully — parser already supports missing Capstone.
structural_elements_evaluated.closing_section: 'Accessibility and Accommodations' as AoS end-bound works correctly. No deviation.

metadata_format.example: Program Code: BAELED Catalog Version: 202603 Published Date: 12/11/2025
metadata_format.note: No page-break footers present — page_count=0. Same as other header-line guides (BSIT, BSMGT). Non-blocking.

manifest_row_note: has_term_structure and has_cu_values both report true because manifest row builder uses standard_path_row_count > 0 as proxy. Cosmetically inaccurate for 2-column education guides — pre-existing behavior, not a blocker.

gate_verdict.rationale: BAELED parsed with HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings, perfect SP/AoS reconciliation. All education_ba structural elements (Clinical Experiences, Student Teaching as AoS group labels, 2-column SP, no Capstone) are already handled by the current parser. No new branch or handler is needed.
gate_verdict.caveat: Sample more education_ba guides before batch rollout. Especially test guides that may have different SP CU totals or additional clinical section variants. The 2-column SP without Term is confirmed stable from BSMES. Confidence is high that the family will parse cleanly.
